content:
✔ If they fail, they must either step down or defend their position.

🚀 Version 6.4 now finalizes structured decision-making, auto-send failures, layered hidden skill checks, the exile-based resurrection system, and ensures players can’t game the system without consequences.
🔥 Are we locking this in? 🎮📖

📌 Version 6.5 – Integrating Literary & Mythological Weapons, Shields, and Artifacts + Scribe Mechanics & Skill Check Complexity


🚀 This iteration finalizes the inventory system by incorporating legendary literary and historical weapons, shields, and artifacts, while expanding the role of the Scribe and structuring skill checks with multiple layers of influence.

📜 1. Inventory System – Weapons, Shields, Armor, Artifacts, & Consumables

📜 Every item falls into a literary or historical category, reinforcing the themes of narrative and myth.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 300 (chunk 300/555)
